Video.summary: On a rainy day, the Wiggles and their friends paint pictures; Anthony introduces the letter A.
Video.title: Fruity Fun

Video.summary: Meet Captain Feathersword's pirate friends, go to a Wiggly concert, meet a koala with Jeff and more!
Video.title: Let's Have a Dance!

Video.summary: Sing and dance to songs from around the world with The Wiggles as they take us to Japan!
Video.title: A Wiggly Concert

Video.summary: Celebrate Captain Feathersword's birthday; The Wiggles sing songs all about animals.
Video.title: Playing a Trick on the Captain

Image.alt: Playing a Trick on the Captain
Playing a Trick on the Captain
Playing a Trick on the Captain

Video.summary: In Dorothy's Dancing Alphabet, we see the letter G and Captain Feathersword shows the gorilla dance.
Video.title: The Gorilla Dance

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword borrows his friend's special nautical jacket; wearing hats in the sun.
Video.title: It's Sunny Today!

Video.summary: Come along on a picnic with The Wiggles; The Little Wiggles decide to go to the beach.
Video.title: Would You Like to Dance With Me?

Image.alt: Would You Like to Dance With Me?
Would You Like to Dance With Me?
Would You Like to Dance With Me?

Video.summary: The Wiggles songs in different languages; Little Anthony dreams about being a superhero of food.
Video.title: Shalom Everybody!

Video.summary: Dance with Dorothy, be amazed as Greg performs magic, sing C'est Wags, C'est Bon in France and more!
Video.title: Sway from Side

Video.summary: Songs about animals; Captain Feathersword's crew have a race; ride in the Big Red Car.
Video.title: Fluff Out Your Feathers

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword and his acrobatic crew dance; The Wiggles learn the importance of cleanliness.
Video.title: Mop-Mop!

Video.summary: See the sites of Sydney Harbour on Captain Feathersword's surprise piratical, nautical vessel.
Video.title: Sydney Harbour

Video.summary: Murray solves a Wiggly mystery.
Video.title: The Long Tail Bilby

Video.summary: Dance at the Wiggle House and later with the Irish dancers; meet a baby freshwater crocodile.
Video.title: The Baby Crocodile

Video.summary: Play with Murray, King of Guitars; Brett Lee joins the fun with a game of cricket.
Video.title: The King of Guitars

Video.summary: Troy Cassar-Daley joins The Wiggles for a song before the fab four play a game with the Captain.
Video.title: Musical Landscape

Video.summary: Troy Cassar-Daley, Wags the Dog, Dorothy the Dinosaur and more friends join for singing and dancing.
Video.title: The King of Swing

Video.summary: Wags digs for bones, Murray plays his guitar, Anthony cooks and Don the Postman pays a visit.
Video.title: Bailar y Cantar

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword and his friends play soccer on the S.S. Feathersword; meet Tom the cockatoo.
Video.title: Shh! Shh! Shh!

Video.summary: Dr. Verygood, a local physician, helps Anthony after he loses his appetite.
Video.title: Amazing Alpaca

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword and his crew do a shoe inspection.
Video.title: All Shook Up

Video.summary: Learn to play the bouzouki travelling with Captain Feathersword.
Video.title: Swish, Swish, Swish

Video.summary: Prince Michael searches for his princess; meet a butcher, a cycle maker and a florist.
Video.title: The Black Velvet Band

Video.summary: Sam helps children with their numeracy skills; The Wiggles and the Captain teach about sun safety.
Video.title: Fun in the Sun

Video.summary: The Wiggles sing a groovy tune about healthy eating, Sam and Jeff play a rhyming game and more!
Video.title: So Early in the Morning

Video.summary: Friendly animals help with counting in Over the Meadow! Plus, Henry teaches about the Gawa people.
Video.title: Together We Live So Happily

Video.summary: Anthony is joined by some dancers dressed up as cowboys; The Wiggles don suits for a special tune.
Video.title: Oh, Captain!

Video.summary: The Wiggles play a fun game of I Spy and then get outside with Captain Feathersword for ball games!
Video.title: Get the Rhythm of the Hips

Image.alt: Get the Rhythm of the Hips
Get the Rhythm of the Hips
Get the Rhythm of the Hips

Video.summary: Have loads of fun learning about healthy veggies before going on an exciting kitten adventure!
Video.title: Kittens and Mittens

Video.summary: Wags and Dorothy play an energetic ball game encouraging children to work together!
Video.title: Surf, Sand and Sun

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword introduces his pirate crew; Dorothy's favorite dance: "Romp Bomp A Stomp."
Video.title: Pirate Dancing

Video.summary: Count along with The Wiggles in "One Finger, One Thumb."
Video.title: My Fair Lady!

Video.summary: Jeff and Murray need help to paint a circus picture; Prince Michael searches for his princess.
Video.title: The Queen of the Land

Video.summary: Henry, Dorothy and Wags one the importance of learning to swim, demonstrating different strokes.
Video.title: Buzz, Buzz, Buzz

Video.summary: Murray and Jeff create a musical scene with a guitar, a piano and animated visuals!
Video.title: Wiggle Dance

Video.summary: The Wiggles compete in a building blocks challenge: Greg and Jeff against Anthony and Murray.
Video.title: Building Blocks

Video.summary: The Wiggles, gearing up for a tour, face a setback as the Big Red Car breaks down.
Video.title: Jeff The Mechanic

Video.summary: On a hot day, Anthony's hair grows rapidly due to the heat; the Wiggles must find him a hairdresser.
Video.title: Haircut

Video.summary: Murray attempts to boost his muscles with a 'muscleman machine.'
Video.title: Muscleman Murray

Video.summary: After watching a spooky movie, The Wiggles mistake their visiting friends for a monster outside.
Video.title: Spooked Wiggles

Video.summary: Murray, Jeff and Greg enlist the help of Captain Feathersword and Wags to get Anthony back Wiggling!
Video.title: Dancing

Video.summary: Tune in as The Wiggles discover how different parts of their bodies help them everyday.
Video.title: Your Body

Video.summary: The Wiggles join Dorothy for a picnic but there's one problem: she's lost her voice.
Video.title: At Play

Video.summary: The Wiggles relax and remember some of the fun times they have had with friends.
Video.title: Friends

Video.summary: Dance and play along as The Wiggles make music using different objects as instruments!
Video.title: Musical Instruments

Video.summary: When The Wiggles find their treasure chest, they think back to the fun times when they were younger.
Video.title: History

Video.summary: With some help from their friends, The Wiggles show that there are many different kinds of families.
Video.title: Family

Video.summary: Lilly Lavender visits the Wiggle House searching for a star for her next film.
Video.title: Lilly Lavender

Video.summary: The Wiggles indulge in food antics, with Anthony devouring everything!
Video.title: Food

Video.summary: Journey through Wiggle Town as The Wiggles visit their friend Dorothy.
Video.title: Safety

Video.summary: Learn about germs and the importance of being clean, from brushing your teeth to washing your hands!
Video.title: Hygiene
